problem_text_cn:
## 一、(15分)

如图表示，面积同为S的两块相同导体薄平板平行放置，间距为d.左侧导体板带电量$ 3Q>0 $，右侧导体板带电量Q，其右侧相距d处有一个质量为m，电量为$-q$($q>0$)的粒子P.导体板静电平衡后，P从静止释放，假设它可自由穿越导体板，且不会影响板上的电荷分布，试问经多长时间T，经多长路程s后，P第一次返回到其初始位置?
problem_text_en:
## One. (15 points)

As shown, two identical conducting plates with equal area S are placed parallel to each other with separation d. The left plate carries charge $3Q>0$, and the right plate carries charge Q. At a distance d to the right of the right plate, there is a particle P of mass m and charge $-q$ ($q>0$). After the plates reach electrostatic equilibrium, P is released from rest. Assuming that P can pass freely through the plates without affecting the charge distribution, after how much time T and after what total path length s will P first return to its initial position?
problem_solution_cn:
## 一、(15分)
由高斯定理和导体板内$ E=0 $,得电荷、场强分布如题解图所示.有
题解图
$$ \left\{\begin{matrix}Q_1+Q_2=3Q,\\Q_1-Q_2=Q,\end{matrix}\right.\Rightarrow\left\{\begin{matrix}Q_1=2Q,\\Q_2=Q.\end{matrix}\right.  \text{(4分)} $$

P的运动分为三个阶段.
第一阶段:从初始位置到右板的运动
$$ E_{1}=2Q/\epsilon_{0}S,\ a_{1}=qE_{1}/m=2qQ/\epsilon_{0}mS, $$
$$ v_{1}=\sqrt{2a_{1}d}=\sqrt{4qQd/\epsilon_{0}mS}, $$
$$ \Rightarrow\ t_{1}=\frac{v_{1}}{a_{1}}=\sqrt{\epsilon_{0}mSd/qQ}.\qquad(3分) $$
第二阶段:板间运动
$$ E_{2}=Q/\epsilon_{0}S,\ a_{2}=qE_{2}/m=qQ/\epsilon_{0}mS,\ v_{2}^{2}=v_{1}^{2}+2a_{2}d=6qQd/\epsilon_{0}mS, $$
$$ \Rightarrow\ t_{2}=\frac{(v_{2}-v_{1})}{a_{2}}=(\sqrt{6}-2)\sqrt{\epsilon_{0}mSd/qQ}.\qquad(3分) $$
第三阶段:从左板朝左运动直到停止
$$ a_{3}=a_{1}=2qQ/\epsilon_{0}mS,\Rightarrow\begin{cases}t_{3}=v_{2}/a_{3}=\sqrt{\frac{3}{2}}\sqrt{\epsilon_{0}mSd/qQ},\\d_{\text{左}}=v_{2}^{2}/2a_{3}=\frac{3}{2}d.\end{cases} \qquad(3分) $$
小结:
$$ T=2(t_{1}+t_{2}+t_{3})=(3\sqrt{6}-2)\sqrt{\epsilon_{0}mSd/qQ},\qquad(1分) $$
$$ s=2(d+d+d_{\text{左}})=7d.\qquad(1分) $$
problem_solution_en:
## One. (15 points)
From Gauss’s law and the condition $E=0$ inside the conductors, the charge and field distribution are as shown in the solution diagram. We have
solution diagram
$$ \left\{\begin{matrix}Q_1+Q_2=3Q,\\Q_1-Q_2=Q,\end{matrix}\right.\Rightarrow\left\{\begin{matrix}Q_1=2Q,\\Q_2=Q.\end{matrix}\right.  \text{(4 points)} $$

The motion of P is divided into three stages.
Stage 1: Motion from the initial position to the right plate
$$ E_{1}=2Q/\epsilon_{0}S,\ a_{1}=qE_{1}/m=2qQ/\epsilon_{0}mS, $$
$$ v_{1}=\sqrt{2a_{1}d}=\sqrt{4qQd/\epsilon_{0}mS}, $$
$$ \Rightarrow\ t_{1}=\frac{v_{1}}{a_{1}}=\sqrt{\epsilon_{0}mSd/qQ}.\qquad(3 points) $$
Stage 2: Motion between the plates
$$ E_{2}=Q/\epsilon_{0}S,\ a_{2}=qE_{2}/m=qQ/\epsilon_{0}mS,\ v_{2}^{2}=v_{1}^{2}+2a_{2}d=6qQd/\epsilon_{0}mS, $$
$$ \Rightarrow\ t_{2}=\frac{(v_{2}-v_{1})}{a_{2}}=(\sqrt{6}-2)\sqrt{\epsilon_{0}mSd/qQ}.\qquad(3 points) $$
Stage 3: Motion from the left plate to the left until stopping
$$ a_{3}=a_{1}=2qQ/\epsilon_{0}mS,\Rightarrow\begin{cases}t_{3}=v_{2}/a_{3}=\sqrt{\frac{3}{2}}\sqrt{\epsilon_{0}mSd/qQ},\\d_{\text{left}}=v_{2}^{2}/2a_{3}=\frac{3}{2}d.\end{cases} \qquad(3 points) $$
Summary:
$$ T=2(t_{1}+t_{2}+t_{3})=(3\sqrt{6}-2)\sqrt{\epsilon_{0}mSd/qQ},\qquad(1 point) $$
$$ s=2(d+d+d_{\text{left}})=7d.\qquad(1 point) $$
img_cn: 图中展示了一个平行放置的导体平板系统。两块面积均为S的矩形导体板左右平行排列，间距为d。左侧导体板上表面标注净电荷为3Q（Q>0），右侧导体板上表面标注净电荷为Q。在右侧导体板右方等距d处，有一个带负电粒子P，标注质量为m、电荷量为$-q$（q>0）。系统采用侧视视角呈现，导体板以竖直虚线表示，粒子的空间位置关系清晰可见。

图中展示了一道物理题的解题过程，包含三个阶段的运动分析与公式推导。第一阶段是带电粒子从初始位置到右板的运动，给出了场强公式$E_1=2Q/\varepsilon_0S$，加速度$a_1$、速度$v_1$和时间$t_1$的计算过程，如$v_1=\sqrt{2a_1d}$等。第二阶段是粒子在板间运动，列出场强$E_2=Q/\varepsilon_0S$及相关速度$v_2$、时间$t_2$公式。第三阶段是从左板朝左运动直至停止，给出加速度$a_3=a_1$、时间$t_3$和距离$d_{\text{左}}$表达式。最后有小结，得出总时间$T$和总路程$s$的计算结果。
img_en: The diagram depicts a system of two parallel conducting plates. Both rectangular plates have equal area S and are placed with a separation distance d. The left plate is marked with a net charge of 3Q (Q>0), while the right plate shows a net charge of Q. To the right of the right plate, another identical distance d away, there exists a negatively charged particle P labeled with mass m and charge $-q$ (q>0). The view is presented laterally, with the plates represented by vertical dashed lines and the particle's spatial configuration clearly illustrated.

The picture shows the solution process of a physics problem, with three stages of motion analysis and formula derivation. In the first stage, the motion of the charged particle from its initial position to the right plate is considered; the field strength formula $E_1=2Q/\varepsilon_0S$, acceleration $a_1$, velocity $v_1$ and time $t_1$ calculations are presented, e.g. $v_1=\sqrt{2a_1d}$ etc. The second stage describes the particle's motion between the plates, listing the field strength $E_2=Q/\varepsilon_0S$ and the corresponding velocity $v_2$ and time $t_2$ formulas. The third stage covers the motion from the left plate to the left until stopping, giving acceleration $a_3=a_1$, time $t_3$ and distance $d_{\text{left}}$ expressions. Finally, a summary provides the calculated total time $T$ and total path length $s$.
